title: fire charge banana 3
description: Graphical change of the fireball item with fire charge to a flaming banana
body:
# 🍌 Fire Charge Banana: A Fun Texture Swap

This resource pack makes a simple, fun graphical change: it swaps the texture of the **Fire Charge** item with a texture of a **flaming banana!**

The project focuses on creating a humorous and visually distinct item for a unique Minecraft experience.

## Support & Contact

**For support, custom resource pack requests, or business inquiries, please contact me via email:** modpacks.max@gmail.com

---

## Other Versions of this Resource Pack
## 
Please view the gallery for this project to see the design. If you are looking for alternate styles (different colors or designs of the banana), please check my other projects on my profile! **Each unique design is uploaded as a separate project to comply with Modrinth rules.**

Version 1:
https://modrinth.com/project/O9e8jgJo
Version 2:
https://modrinth.com/project/v5lsjOSV

Thank you for downloading and enjoy your Fire Charge Banana!
